summary: Top‑rated audience recording with a full, strong sound; the entire second set is intact and flows nicely.
review: The reviewer praises this version as the best audience source they’ve heard, noting a very full and strong transfer that retains mids and highs despite a slight bass‑heavy tilt. The whole second set is present without any cuts in either eyes or drums, giving listeners an uninterrupted listening experience. Musical performance details are sparse, but the completeness of the set suggests a solid show.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 4‑star review highlights excellent audience sound quality and a complete second set, leading to an overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bass‑heavy but mids and highs still present; full, strong sounding transfer with no noticeable cuts or dropouts.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is complete and uninterrupted, providing a smooth listening experience.
